description: Master formulary URL registry â€” single source of truth for all formulary data sources across 50 states + DC. Used for annual refresh: copy file, increment year, HEAD-check URLs, re-fetch, re-parse.
annual_refresh_process: 2. Replace '2026' with '2027' in all formulary_url fields (crude first pass)
3. Run HEAD requests on every URL to check for 404s
4. Fix broken URLs â€” check carrier websites for updated paths
5. Check CMS QHP PUF for new market entrants per state
6. Compare carrier lists year-over-year for market exits
7. Re-fetch and re-parse all PDFs and JSON endpoints
8. Update drugs_parsed counts from parsed output files

summary.ffe_source: formulary_intelligence.json (4.0 GB, 12,955,136 plan-level records — 196,303 original deduped + 12,758,833 from 32 additional issuers fetched 2026-04-04)
summary.notes: FFE records are plan-level (one record per drug x plan). SBM records are drug-level per-carrier formulary files. Not directly comparable. | +6 FN issuers appended 2026-04-04: CareSource MI/NC/NV, Anthem GA/NV/KY

carriers.notes: All FFE state carriers come from the single federal MR-PUF file. Per-carrier drugs fetched via index.json â†’ drugs.json chain.
